# Lisa Menerick Piano Studio — Full Site Content

> Piano & voice lessons in Grand Rapids, MI and along the Lakeshore.
> Private and group instruction for ages 4 through adult.
> Website: https://grandrapidspiano.com/

---

## Home

**Tagline:** Where Grand Rapids Finds Its Resonance.

Lisa Menerick Piano Studio offers over 40 years of masterful piano and voice instruction in West Michigan. The studio serves medical professionals, high-achieving families, and urban creatives seeking cognitive development, stress relief, and musical artistry.

**Studio stats:**
- 40+ years teaching piano & voice
- National Guild of Piano Teachers member since 1979

**Core values:**
1. Cognitive Development — Suzuki-informed method develops patience, problem-solving, and deep focus.
2. A Restorative Outlet — Piano study provides proven stress relief and neurological reset.
3. Elevated Performance — From studio run-throughs to formal Spring Recitals.
4. Tailored Instruction — Uniquely crafted curricula that respect each student's time and goals.

---

## Who We Serve

The studio is a haven for individuals and families across Grand Rapids who value excellence, discipline, and the enrichment that musical mastery provides.

**Medical Professionals:** The pace on the Medical Mile demands relentless precision. Piano study offers a restorative challenge that activates new neural pathways while providing profound stress relief — a true cognitive reset after a demanding week at Corewell Health.

**High-Achieving Families:** From Forest Hills to East Grand Rapids and Ada, our curriculum instills discipline, patience, and screen-free focus. Students gain a cognitive edge and the lifelong gift of musical mastery.

**Urban Creatives:** Living in Heritage Hill or downtown Grand Rapids means being surrounded by a vibrant arts culture. Deepen your connection to the city's creative pulse by mastering an instrument in a sophisticated, adult-centered studio environment.

---

## About Lisa Menerick

A celebrated educator, performer, and former Mayor of Ferrysburg, Lisa Menerick brings a lifetime of musical passion and community dedication to every lesson.

Originally from East Grand Rapids — where she grew up across the street from President Gerald R. Ford — Lisa has been a fixture in the West Michigan music scene for decades. A theater education major at Michigan State University, she also holds degrees from Sullins College (Bristol, VA), Wayne State University, and Grand Valley State University.

Lisa spent nearly 50 years as an elementary educator, most recently with Muskegon Public Schools, while simultaneously teaching private piano and voice for over 40 years. Her performing career has taken her from intimate local nursing homes to singing the national anthem at Loutit District Library's naturalization ceremony, performing at the annual Ferrysburg Carol Sing, and singing for the Professional Bull Riders as a licensed rodeo consultant.

**Professional credentials and memberships:**
- Certified Suzuki Instructor
- Michigan Music Teachers National Association (MMTNA)
- National Guild of Piano Teachers — member since 1979
- Grand Rapids Piano Teacher Forum
- Lifetime Member, St. Cecilia Music Society

Lisa performs and lectures professionally, offering private and group piano and voice lessons to students from age 4 through adult — from studios in Grand Rapids and along the Lakeshore.

---

## Admissions

Lessons are available for students as young as 4 years old through adult. Both private and group instruction formats are offered.

**To get started:**
- Request a free Studio Tour & Intro Lesson
- Book a complimentary consultation

Contact via: https://grandrapidspiano.com/
